title: Mridangam Performance Site
description: Personal website showcasing Carnatic music performances, upcoming concerts, and teaching philosophy — currently in development.
overview: A personal website dedicated to showcasing my Carnatic music journey, performances, and teaching philosophy. Currently in active development with plans for launch in 2026.

sections.heading: Planned Features
bullets: Performance gallery with video embeds and audio samples from concerts and events
Upcoming concert schedule and event calendar
Teaching philosophy and approach to Carnatic music education
Blog section for insights on mridangam techniques and Carnatic music theory
Contact form for booking inquiries and collaboration opportunities
Integration with Firebase for dynamic content management
